message:
chore(artifacts): add verification evidence for demotion controller and parser runs

New timestamped verification evidence directories:

- frx_online_regret_change_point_demotion_controller: 7 runs
  (214117Z through 221405Z) documenting demotion threshold tuning
  and regression testing
- parser_operator_developer_runbook: 4 runs (215049Z through
  221147Z) from runbook execution validation
- frx_04_4_replay_failover_incident: 1 run (214421Z) documenting
  failover replay behavior under incident conditions
- parser_performance_promotion_gate: Initial gate verification runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
